name: Tabs
description: A tabbed interface for switching between views.

props.name: active
props.description: Zero-based index of the currently active tab.

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual variant controlling tab styling - `'line'` (indicator bar), `'enclosed'` (bordered tabs), `'solid'` (filled background), or `'unstyled'`.

props.name: colorScheme
props.description: Accent color scheme for active tab indicator and text.

props.name: fitted
props.description: Stretch tabs to fill the available width equally.

props.name: align
props.description: Horizontal/vertical alignment of tabs within the tab list.

props.name: disabledTabs
props.description: Array of zero-based tab indices that should be disabled. Attribute accepts comma-separated numbers.

props.name: label
props.description: Accessible label for the tab list (required when no visible heading labels the group).

events.name: kb-tab-change
events.description: Dispatched when active tab changes, with `detail.index` and `detail.previousIndex`.
